title: Inventory Management Platform
challenge: A growing retail business struggled with manual stock tracking across multiple locations, leading to frequent discrepancies and delayed reordering.
solution: Healisys Solutions developed a centralised web-based inventory system with real-time updates, role-based access, and automated low-stock alerts.
outcome: Stock accuracy improved significantly and reorder cycles became predictable, reducing operational overhead.

title: Fleet Tracking Mobile App
challenge: A logistics operator needed drivers and dispatchers to coordinate deliveries without relying on phone calls and spreadsheets.
solution: A cross-platform mobile app with live location sharing, delivery status updates, and push notifications was built and deployed.
outcome: Dispatch coordination became faster and customers received timely delivery status updates.

title: Patient Portal System
challenge: A healthcare provider wanted patients to book appointments and access reports online while maintaining data privacy.
solution: A secure patient portal with appointment scheduling, report downloads, and encrypted data handling was developed.
outcome: Front-desk workload reduced and patients gained convenient self-service access.

title: E-commerce Store Rebuild
challenge: An online brand faced slow page loads and a confusing checkout that affected conversion rates.
solution: The store was rebuilt with optimised performance, simplified navigation, and integrated payment gateways popular in India.
outcome: Page speed improved and the checkout experience became smoother for customers.

title: Enterprise HR Dashboard
challenge: A manufacturing company managed employee records across disconnected spreadsheets and legacy tools.
solution: An integrated HR dashboard with attendance, leave management, and reporting modules was delivered.
outcome: HR processes were centralised and management gained clearer workforce visibility.

title: Learning Management System
challenge: An education provider needed to deliver courses online with progress tracking and assessments.
solution: A custom LMS with course modules, quizzes, certificates, and admin analytics was built.
outcome: Learners accessed courses remotely and administrators tracked engagement effectively.

title: API Integration Hub
challenge: A SaaS company needed to connect multiple third-party services without custom code for each integration.
solution: A modular API integration layer with standardised connectors and monitoring was implemented.
outcome: New integrations were deployed faster with reduced maintenance effort.

title: Legacy System Modernisation
challenge: A long-running desktop application was difficult to maintain and could not scale with business growth.
solution: The system was re-architected into a cloud-ready web application with improved security and maintainability.
outcome: Maintenance costs decreased and the platform became accessible from any location.
